text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tosen Jordan and I are having a meeting when...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yikes... My nails have gotten way too long.
There's so much natural nail showing.
choice_data_list: You're not going to get them done again?
You're not going to get them done again?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: In what free time? All I do is race, race, race.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I keep on top of my toenails, but... my
fingernails? Well, I guess like this is better than
nothing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For someone who's always so particular about her
nails, this is a rare sight. She must really be
fatigued. It might be a good idea to take another
look at her race schedule.
